heading: Federal funding prohibited
label: 6763 Federal funding prohibited
text: The Association may not receive, accept, or borrow any amounts from the Federal Government to pay for, or reimburse, the Association for, the costs of establishing or operating the Association.1So in original. The comma probably should not appear.1
